title: viburnum mathewsii
intro: Viburnum mathewsii, also known as Texas snowball viburnum, is a flowering plant species native to the south-central United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting digestion, due to the presence of compounds like viburnin and tannins. In herbal preparations, Viburnum mathewsii is often made into a tea, infused in oil, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
